URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/
# Forest Therapy Certification | Heartwood School of Forest Therapy
- A forest therapy certification program rooted in mindfulness, somatics, and Earth's wisdom. Trauma-informed training led by experienced guides.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/about
## About
- Introduction to Heartwood School of Forest Therapy, including mission and guiding principles for the certification program.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/certification-pathways
## Certification Pathways
- Overview of available certification pathways and options for prospective students.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/online
## Online Pathway
- Details on the online certification pathway, course structure, duration, and learning outcomes.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/retreat
## Retreat Pathway
- Information on the retreat-based certification pathway, focusing on immersive, hands-on learning in nature.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/heartwood-collective
## Heartwood Collective
- Community platform for certified guides offering resources, networking, and ongoing support.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/blog
## Blog
- Articles and insights on forest therapy, mindfulness, and personal growth for practitioners and the general public.

URL: https://www.heartwoodschoolforesttherapy.com/faq
## FAQ
- Frequently asked questions covering prerequisites, costs, and training details of the certification program.
